scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,api,admin,seed -c blue,magenta,cyan,yellow "VITE_API_PROXY_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:${API_PORT:-8787} npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix worker run dev" "npm --prefix admin run dev" "sleep 8 && curl -sf -X POST 'http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8787}/api/dev/seed?force=true' && echo 'Economy seeded (fresh bootstrap)' || echo 'Seed skipped (ADMIN_API_KEY is set — run npm run reset manually)'"
scripts.reset: curl -sf -X POST "http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8787}/api/dev/seed?force=true" && echo 'Economy reset + reseeded' || echo 'Reset failed — is the worker running? (npm run dev:api)'
scripts.deploy: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix frontend run deploy
